question: How does radio report flow work in this setting?
short_answer: Observation becomes a structured report, the report moves over radio, the report ages while it travels, and the HQ picture may arrive stale or incomplete.
evidence_summary: 16-line message format gives the message skeleton.
Radiotelephony procedure gives the spoken discipline and spelling alphabet.
Omaha and Cross-Channel Attack show what happens when radios are lost or reports arrive late.

simulation_variables.effect: controls how much the report helps the map.
controls how stale the report is on arrival.
controls whether the message gets through at all.

game_implications: The report ledger should feel like a living communications problem.
Players should learn to prefer concise, high-confidence reports when under fire.
